desktop.domain_blocked_body: {domain} is blocked. A request was sent to your parent. You can ask them to approve access in Guardian.
desktop.app_blocked_body: '{app}' has been closed because usage limits are reached.
desktop.clock_tamper_body: Access is paused until the clock is fixed or a parent approves override.
desktop.clock_tamper_cleared_body: The device clock looks correct again. Normal access can resume.
